package rulecoverage

func NegativeTimeUntilCandidateViaDeadlineSubNow() string {
    ruleID := "time_until_candidate_via_deadline_sub_now"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`deadline.Sub(time.Now())` instead of `time.Until(deadline)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
